text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, November 09. No work meetings today. You have FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville and Sarah wanting to work on her design course.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Good planning. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Relaxation mode active. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan's team played a match and won 1-0! The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. I've got the schedule covered. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Doing some cleaning around the house. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Let's get that resolved. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Healthy choices are great. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Having dinner with our friends tonight. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've noted the plans. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Bedtime can be a challenge. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Personal time is valuable. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Great progress. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Checking on some house maintenance items. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: I can help troubleshoot that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. That is a clean implementation. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Prepping school lunches for the week. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Let's organize the menu. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Having dinner with our friends tonight. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've noted the plans. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Spent some quality time stargazing with the telescope. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
